home.title:
Built for Efficiency,
Secure Local Utilities.
home.subtitle: Practical Web Tools
home.desc: Say goodbye to complex online services and privacy risks. We provide a suite of professional, lightweight, and zero-latency web tools. All data processing and calculations are performed entirely in your browser without uploading to any server, ensuring the fastest response times and 100% data privacy. Your reliable companion for everyday digital tasks.

privacy.title: Privacy & Copyright
privacy.subtitle: Privacy & Copyright
privacy.copyrightText: All content, interface design, and source code of 'Utility Lab' are protected by copyright law. Unauthorized use for commercial purposes is prohibited.
privacy.privacyIntro: We value your privacy and commit to the following:
privacy.localText: All tools (including calculators, unit converters, image compression, and PDF merging) run entirely within your browser (Client-Side) without server involvement.
privacy.dataText: We do not upload, store, intercept, or collect any of your input data, personal settings, or processed files.
privacy.trackText: This site does not use any intrusive user behavioral trackers or advertising analytics.
privacy.footer: All data processed locally. Zero data tracking.

zipcode.title: Zip Code Lookup
zipcode.subtitle: Zip Code Lookup
zipcode.desc1: Provide zip code lookup service for cities, townships, and districts in Taiwan.
zipcode.desc2: Whether you are sending a package, returning online purchases, or building customer records, the correct 3-digit zip code is key to ensuring smooth logistics. This tool organizes the latest standards from Taiwan Post. Simply use the intuitive dropdown menu to select your city and district, and the system will instantly display the corresponding zip code.
zipcode.guide1: Select the city from the first dropdown menu, and the second menu will show the districts in that city.
zipcode.guide2: The system has the latest 3-digit zip code mapping for Taiwan built-in.

age.title: Age Calculator
age.subtitle: Age Calculator
age.desc1: Accurately calculate your actual age. Select birth date and target date, and the system will automatically convert it into precise years, months, and days.
age.desc2: In addition to "years", this calculator can also break down the "total months" and "total days" from birth to the specified date. This is very useful for accurately calculating baby age, planning insurance age, filling out legal documents, or simply knowing how many days you have spent in this world.
age.guide1: Birth Date: Select your birth date. Target Date: Default is today, but you can select any day in the past or future.
age.guide2: Detailed Age: Calculate complete years, months, and days. Total Months: Years * 12 + remaining months. Total Days: Absolute day difference.

bmi.title: BMI Calculator
bmi.subtitle: Body Mass Index
bmi.desc1: BMI is an important indicator to assess whether your weight is ideal. Simply input your height and weight, and we will automatically calculate your BMI and provide a preliminary assessment of your health status.
bmi.desc2: Maintaining a standard BMI helps prevent cardiovascular diseases, diabetes, and other chronic diseases. This tool uses WHO standards to grade your BMI.
bmi.guide1: Height: Enter your actual height in cm. Weight: Enter your actual weight in kg. BMI = Weight(kg) / [Height(m)]²

datediff.title: Date Difference
datediff.subtitle: Date Difference
datediff.desc1: Easily calculate the days and weeks between two dates. Whether planning a project schedule, counting down to an anniversary, or tracking time elapsed since a specific event, get accurate results instantly.
datediff.desc2: Manual date calculation is prone to errors, especially with leap years and months with varying days. This tool automatically handles these complexities, calculating the absolute difference and converting it into "weeks and days" format. Supports past and future dates.
datediff.guide1: Please set "Start Date" and "End Date". Order does not matter. The system automatically calculates absolute difference. Negative sign indicates end date is earlier.
datediff.guide2:
Both dates are converted to UTC midnight to avoid DST or timezone errors.
Total Days: Milliseconds difference divided by 86,400,000.
Weeks and Days: Total days divided by 7 for weeks, remainder for days.

discount.title: Discount & Fee
discount.subtitle: Discount & Fee Calculator
discount.desc1: Quickly calculate shopping discounts, restaurant service fees, and final total price.
discount.desc2: No more rushing before checkout! Whether it is a department store discount or a restaurant service fee, this tool can help you calculate the exact amount to pay in an instant. You can freely choose whether the service fee is calculated based on the "original price" or "discounted price".
discount.guide1: Original Price: Enter the original price of the item or meal.
discount.guide2: Discount Ratio: Enter the discount percentage (e.g. 80 for 20% off). If no discount, enter 100.
discount.guide3: Service Fee %: Enter the service fee percentage.
discount.guide4: Fee Base: Choose whether the service fee is based on the original or discounted price.

password.title: Password Generator
password.subtitle: Password Generator
password.desc1: Quickly generate high-strength random passwords locally, customize length and character types.
password.desc2: Strong passwords are the first line of defense against account hacking. This tool generates passwords entirely within your browser using cryptographically secure random number generation. We do not store or transmit any passwords.
password.guide1: Length: Recommended to be at least 12 characters. Character types: Select uppercase, lowercase, numbers, and symbols based on requirements.

percentage.title: Percentage Calculator
percentage.subtitle: Percentage Calculator
percentage.desc1: Provides various practical percentage calculation scenarios. Calculate the percentage of a specific value, the ratio between two values, and the growth or decline rate.
percentage.desc2: Percentage calculation is ubiquitous in financial statements, performance analysis, or discount calculation. We isolated the three most common scenarios. You can quickly calculate "discounted price", "target achievement ratio", or "year-over-year revenue growth".
percentage.guide1: Enter numeric values in the corresponding fields. Decimals are supported. Empty or non-numeric values will not be calculated.
percentage.mode1: What percentage of B is A?
percentage.mode3: Percentage change from A to B
percentage.guide2:
Scenario 1: Y * (X / 100)
Scenario 2: (A / B) * 100
Scenario 3: (B - A) / A * 100. Positive implies growth (+), negative implies decline (-).
percentage.calc2_title: VALUE A IS WHAT % OF VALUE B?

qrcode.title: QR Code Generator
qrcode.subtitle: QR Code Generator
qrcode.desc1: Quickly convert URLs or text into a QR Code barcode.
qrcode.desc2: Whether sharing a personal website, contact info, or Wi-Fi password, simply enter the content below and the system will generate the corresponding QR code instantly. Scan directly from the screen or download the PNG. All conversions happen on your device.
qrcode.guide1: Enter URL (include http:// or https:// for mobile devices), text, or contact info.
qrcode.guide2: Uses qrcode.react to encode string into a matrix drawing on Canvas. No data is sent to external APIs.

unitconvert.title: Unit Converter
unitconvert.subtitle: Unit Converter
unitconvert.desc1: Integrates common length, weight, and area units for fast and accurate conversion. Supports bi-directional conversion between metric and imperial units.
unitconvert.desc2: Not sure about inch sizes when shopping abroad? Need to convert ounces to grams for recipes? Or square meters to ping for real estate? This tool covers various international standard units with intuitive bi-directional conversion and high-precision floating point calculation.
unitconvert.guide1: Select the category first. Then choose the units to convert from and to, and enter the value.
unitconvert.guide2: The system has built-in conversion factors for various units. Formula: Value × (From Unit Factor) ÷ (To Unit Factor).

image.title: Image Compressor
image.subtitle: Image Compressor
image.desc1: Compress images directly on your device using the browser's native Canvas API.
image.desc2: Modern photos are often too large to email or upload. This tool lets you adjust quality and instantly preview the compressed size. All processing is done locally without uploading to any server.
image.guide1: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP. Adjust the quality slider below. Lower values mean smaller files but lower quality.

pdfmerge.title: PDF Merger
pdfmerge.subtitle: PDF Merge Utility
pdfmerge.desc1: Secure and fast PDF file merging tool. All processing is done in your browser, ensuring sensitive documents are not uploaded to any server.
pdfmerge.desc2: In office scenarios, we often need to merge multiple reports or scanned documents into a single PDF for sending or archiving. Traditional online tools require uploading to third-party servers, posing data leak risks. This tool uses Web Assembly to process locally.
pdfmerge.guide1:
1. Click or drag to upload PDFs.
2. Must select at least 2 files.
3. Must be valid, unencrypted .pdf files.
pdfmerge.drag: Click or drag multiple PDF files here
pdfmerge.guide2: Uses pdf-lib to read PDFs locally and copy pages into a new PDF document. Fully processed in browser without server upload.

stockfee.title: Stock Fee Calculator
stockfee.subtitle: Stock Fee Calculator
stockfee.desc1: Quickly calculate stock trading fees, taxes, and profits.
stockfee.desc2: In addition to the price difference, fees and taxes are important factors affecting profitability. This tool provides a complete calculation of buying and selling costs, supporting custom broker discounts and different tax rates.
stockfee.guide1: Enter buy/sell prices and shares. Brokerage Discount: e.g. 60 for 40% off. Min Fee: Minimum fee charged by the broker.
stockfee.guide2:
Brokerage Fee = Price × Shares × 0.1425% × Discount.
Tax = Sell Price × Shares × Tax Rate.
Net Profit = Sell Revenue - Buy Cost.

imagecompress.guide1:
1. Click or drag to upload supported formats (JPG, PNG, WEBP, etc).
2. Enter target max file size in MB. Default is 1MB.
imagecompress.guide2: Uses browser-image-compression with Web Workers locally. Dynamically reduces quality or resolution (max 1920px) to hit target size while preserving details.
imagecompress.desc1: Efficiently compress image files locally. Customize target file size to save storage space without severely impacting quality, ensuring image privacy.
imagecompress.desc2: Modern smartphone or camera photos are often several MBs, making it difficult to upload to sites with capacity limits or send via email. This tool lets you set a target size (e.g., 1MB) and uses browser algorithms to adjust resolution and quality. No cloud upload needed.

passwordgen.guide1:
1. Adjust the slider for desired length (8-64).
2. Select at least one character type: uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols.
passwordgen.guide2: Uses window.crypto.getRandomValues for cryptographically secure pseudo-random number generation, ensuring high unpredictability, rather than standard Math.random().
passwordgen.desc1: Securely generate high-strength passwords randomly on your device.
passwordgen.desc2: We use the browser's built-in secure random number generator (Web Crypto API). All passwords are computationally generated locally in real-time, with no risk of upload leaks. Customize length and character types, and copy with one click.

currency.title: Currency Converter
currency.subtitle: Real-time Exchange Rates
currency.desc1: Get real-time exchange rates for major global currencies and quickly convert between them.
